1. [CRITICAL] Implement Multi-Sig Authority
   → Reduces single point of failure
   → Use MPC system (src/mpc/)
   → Recommend 3-of-5 configuration

2. [HIGH] Add Program Upgrade Guards
   → Protect against unauthorized upgrades
   → Implement timelock delays

3. [HIGH] Monitor Bot Performance
   → Alert on earning rate drops
   → Real-time performance tracking

4. [MEDIUM] Implement Rate Limits
   → Prevent bot abuse
   → Add circuit breakers

5. [MEDIUM] Add Emergency Pause Functions
   → Stop operations during incidents
   → Preserve funds during crisis
